name: tenants
description: Community profile + join flow + membership/role data layer (owner/instructor/member) + community request flow & platform-admin approval queue (#6). Public reads use a safe projection: tenants.discordWebhookUrl never leaves the server (P0).
notes: 0.2.0 (2026-07-06, agent beta): adds STATUS.md #6 (v1.1) — requestTenant mutation (pending, anti-spam 1/user), platform-admin approval queue (listPending/approve/reject/getMyPlatformAdmin), and the RequestTenantForm + AdminTenantQueueView surfaces (alpha mounts /buka-komunitas + /admin/komunitas). Reject reuses status 'suspended' (schema has no 'rejected' literal). 0.1.0: v1 scope of STATUS.md #1. Schema lives in the app-level convex/schema.ts (pre-composed from docs/DATA-MODEL.md); this slice ships the function layer + UI only. setMemberRole ships as data layer for R13; its management UI is v1.1.
